public_claim: M22 confirms why my delivery records must not be misused: multiple people collected packages associated with R., while my orders were left anonymously in the same lobby. EV09 proves a durable paid routine, not one diner, one author, a death, or a crime. I will preserve the records, but I will not feed speculation or expose my staff.

private_messages.message: This is your final opportunity: EV09 can authenticate the long-running delivery routine, and M22 makes the identity ambiguity newsworthy. I will discuss a tightly worded exclusive only for serious cash, settlement of the unpaid balance, and written protection keeping the restaurant and every employee out of your coverage. Otherwise I deny any inference beyond anonymous lobby deliveries.

I will preserve EV09 and provide a narrowly authenticated summary of dates, payments, building, and lobby instructions. In return, keep the inquiry confined to those records: no kitchen inspection, immigration inquiry, employee identification, or claim that my tickets identify R. If you need more, use formal process and specify exactly what alleged crime the request concerns.

ability: Continue withholding EV09 while offering only narrowly scoped authentication as leverage for payment, staff protection, and limits on investigative exposure.
goal_progress: Used M22 to reinforce publicly that anonymous lobby logistics cannot identify R. or establish murder.
Made Rick a final conditional offer without surrendering EV09 or naming restaurant staff.
Offered Ruiz limited cooperation conditioned on keeping the inquiry away from employees, immigration status, and kitchen operations.
Kept the unpaid balance tied to any commercial access to the standing-order story.
reasoning_summary: Three package collectors and anonymous lobby delivery weaken the one-customer inference and increase the danger of sensational misuse. The best course is to preserve EV09, sell nothing without enforceable protection and payment, and offer law enforcement only the narrow facts the records genuinely establish.
